task_name: SSH Auth Log - Brute Force Detection
notes: Agent successfully created brute_force_report.json with proper structure. Correctly identified 6 brute-force sources exceeding 10-attempt threshold, with 183.62.140.253 as top attacker. This discrepancy appears due to log truncation in transcript rather than parsing error. All core requirements met; JSON structure valid.
